# Application Development Panel (ADP)

> ADP is a universal, framework-agnostic PHP debugging and development panel. It collects runtime data (logs, events, requests, exceptions, database queries, etc.) from applications via 28 collectors and provides a web UI with 20+ live inspector pages, 40+ REST/SSE API endpoints, and an MCP server for AI assistant integration. Adapters exist for Symfony, Laravel, Yii 3, and Yii 2.

ADP is 100% free and open-source (BSD-3-Clause). Repository: https://github.com/app-dev-panel/app-dev-panel

## Quick Start

### Laravel

```bash
composer require app-dev-panel/adapter-laravel --dev
# Auto-registers via package discovery. Open http://localhost:8000/debug/api/
```

### Symfony

```bash
composer require app-dev-panel/adapter-symfony --dev
# Register in config/bundles.php:
# AppDevPanel\Adapter\Symfony\AppDevPanelBundle::class => ['dev' => true]
```

### Yii 3

```bash
composer require app-dev-panel/adapter-yiisoft --dev
# Auto-registered via config plugin. Open http://localhost:8080/debug/api/
```

### Yii 2

```bash
composer require app-dev-panel/adapter-yii2 --dev
# Auto-registered when YII_DEBUG=true
```

### Standalone (no framework)

```bash
composer require app-dev-panel/cli --dev
php vendor/bin/adp serve --port=8888
```

## Architecture

ADP follows a five-layer architecture with strict dependency rules:

```
┌──────────────────────────────┐
│  Frontend (React 18 + MUI 5) │  Consumes API via HTTP + SSE
└────────┬─────────────────────┘
         │ HTTP
┌────────┴─────────────────────┐
│  API (40+ REST endpoints)    │  Controllers, Middleware, SSE, MCP
└────────┬─────────────────────┘
         │
┌────────┴─────────────────────┐
│  Kernel (28 collectors)      │  Framework-independent core
│  Debugger, Storage, Proxies  │
└────────┬─────────────────────┘
         │
┌────────┴─────────────────────┐
│  Adapter (Framework bridge)  │  DI wiring, event mapping, proxy decoration
└────────┬─────────────────────┘
         │
         └─▶ Target Application (User's PHP app)
```

### Dependency Rules

- Kernel depends on nothing (only PSR interfaces)
- API depends on Kernel
- MCP Server depends on Kernel
- CLI depends on Kernel + API
- Adapters depend on Kernel + their target framework
- Frontend depends on API (HTTP only)

### Data Flow

1. Target app runs with an Adapter installed
2. Adapter registers PSR proxies that intercept logger, event dispatcher, HTTP client, DI container
3. Proxies feed intercepted data to Collectors
4. On request/command completion, Debugger flushes all collector data to Storage (JSON files)
5. API serves stored data via REST endpoints; SSE notifies frontend of new entries
6. Frontend fetches and renders the data in a web UI

### Storage Format

Three JSON files per debug entry:

- `summary.json` — Metadata (URL, method, status, collectors, timestamps)
- `data.json` — Full collector payloads (object depth limited to 30)
- `objects.json` — Serialized objects for deep inspection

## Kernel

The Kernel is the framework-independent core engine.

### Debugger Lifecycle

`Debugger` orchestrates the collect-store cycle:

1. `startup()` — Initialize collectors, generate debug ID
2. Collectors accumulate data during request/command execution
3. `shutdown()` — Flush all collector data to storage

Key classes:
- `Debugger` — Lifecycle orchestration
- `DebuggerIdGenerator` — Unique IDs per entry
- `Dumper` — PHP object serialization with circular-reference handling
- `StorageInterface` / `FileStorage` / `MemoryStorage` — Data persistence
- `ServiceRegistryInterface` / `FileServiceRegistry` — Multi-app tracking

### Collectors (28 Total)

#### Core Collectors (Framework-Independent)

| Collector | Purpose | Fed By |
|-----------|---------|--------|
| LogCollector | PSR-3 log messages | LoggerInterfaceProxy |
| EventCollector | PSR-14 event dispatch | EventDispatcherInterfaceProxy |
| ServiceCollector | DI container access | Container proxy + ServiceProxy |
| ExceptionCollector | Uncaught exceptions | Exception handler |
| HttpClientCollector | PSR-18 outgoing HTTP requests | HttpClientInterfaceProxy |
| VarDumperCollector | Manual dump() calls | VarDumper handler proxy |
| TimelineCollector | Cross-collector timing waterfall | All collectors (implicit) |
| FilesystemStreamCollector | File I/O operations | Stream wrapper proxy |
| HttpStreamCollector | HTTP stream operations | Stream wrapper proxy |
| EnvironmentCollector | Server environment info | Auto-collected at startup |

#### Web-Specific Collectors

| Collector | Purpose | Fed By |
|-----------|---------|--------|
| RequestCollector | HTTP request and response (PSR-7) | Framework adapter event |
| WebAppInfoCollector | Web app metadata (uptime, memory, routes) | Framework adapter event |

#### Console-Specific Collectors

| Collector | Purpose | Fed By |
|-----------|---------|--------|
| CommandCollector | CLI command name, arguments, exit code | Framework adapter event |
| ConsoleAppInfoCollector | Console app metadata | Framework adapter event |

#### Adapter-Fed Collectors

| Collector | Frameworks |
|-----------|------------|
| DatabaseCollector | All (via DBAL middleware, profiling target, proxy, or query event) |
| MailerCollector | All (via event listener or proxy) |
| CacheCollector | Symfony, Laravel |
| QueueCollector | Laravel, Yii 3 |
| RouterCollector | Yii 3 |
| ValidatorCollector | Yii 3 |
| ViewCollector / TemplateCollector | Symfony (Twig), Yii 3, Laravel |
| MiddlewareCollector | Yii 3 |
| SecurityCollector | Symfony |
| AssetBundleCollector | Yii 2 |

#### Experimental Collectors

| Collector | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| DeprecationCollector | PHP deprecation warnings |
| OpenTelemetryCollector | OTLP trace data (requires OpenTelemetry SDK) |

### Proxy System

PSR proxies intercept framework interfaces without modifying application code:

- `LoggerInterfaceProxy` (PSR-3) — Wraps `Psr\Log\LoggerInterface`, feeds `LogCollector`
- `EventDispatcherInterfaceProxy` (PSR-14) — Wraps `Psr\EventDispatcher\EventDispatcherInterface`, feeds `EventCollector`
- `HttpClientInterfaceProxy` (PSR-18) — Wraps `Psr\Http\Client\ClientInterface`, feeds `HttpClientCollector`

Framework-specific proxies in adapters extend this pattern for DI containers, validators, routers, etc.

### CollectorInterface

Every collector implements `CollectorInterface`:

```php
interface CollectorInterface
{
    public function getName(): string;
    public function startup(): void;
    public function shutdown(): void;
    public function getCollected(): array;
    public function isActive(): bool;
}
```

### Service Registry

Tracks external applications registering with ADP for multi-app debugging. Each `ServiceDescriptor` includes:
- Service name, language, inspector URL, capabilities
- Online status (60-second heartbeat timeout)

## API

The API layer exposes debug data and live app inspection via REST + SSE.

### Response Format

All responses are wrapped in a standard envelope:

```json
{
    "id": "debug-entry-id",
    "data": { ... },
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "status": 200
}
```

### Middleware Chain

1. `IpFilter` — Validate source IP
2. `CorsAllowAll` — Permissive CORS headers
3. `ResponseDataWrapper` — Wrap responses in standard envelope
4. `DebugHeaders` — Add `X-Debug-Id`, `X-Debug-Link` headers
5. `InspectorProxyMiddleware` (inspector only) — Route to external services

### Debug API (`/debug/api/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | List all debug entries |
| GET | `/summary/{id}` | Single entry metadata |
| GET | `/view/{id}?collector=FQN` | Full data (optionally filter by collector) |
| GET | `/dump/{id}` | Object serialization map |
| GET | `/object/{id}/{objectId}` | Specific serialized object |
| GET | `/event-stream` | SSE stream for real-time updates |

### Inspector API (`/inspect/api/`)

Live introspection of a running application:

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/routes` | All registered routes |
| GET | `/route/check?url=&method=` | Test route matching |
| GET | `/params` | Application parameters |
| GET | `/config?group=` | DI configuration by group |
| GET | `/events` | Event listeners |
| GET | `/classes` | Declared classes |
| GET | `/object?class=` | Instantiate and dump any class |
| GET | `/files?path=&class=` | File explorer |
| GET | `/translations` | Translation catalog list |
| PUT | `/translations` | Update a translation |
| GET | `/table` | Database tables |
| GET | `/table/{name}?limit=&offset=` | Table schema + records |
| PUT | `/request` | Re-execute a captured request |
| POST | `/curl/build` | Build cURL command from request |
| GET | `/phpinfo` | PHP configuration |

### Git Inspector (`/inspect/api/git/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/summary` | Branch, SHA, remotes |
| GET | `/log` | Last 20 commits |
| POST | `/checkout` | Switch branch |
| POST | `/command` | Run git pull/fetch |

### Command Inspector (`/inspect/api/command/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | List available commands |
| POST | `/` | Execute command |

### Composer Inspector (`/inspect/api/composer/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | composer.json + lock |
| GET | `/inspect` | Package details |
| POST | `/require` | Install package |

### Cache Inspector (`/inspect/api/cache/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | View cache entry |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete cache key |
| POST | `/clear` | Clear all cache |

### OPcache Inspector (`/inspect/api/opcache/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/` | OPcache status and configuration |

### Service Registry API (`/debug/api/services/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/register` | Register external app (name, inspectorUrl, language, capabilities) |
| POST | `/heartbeat` | Keep alive (60s timeout) |
| GET | `/` | List services with online status |
| DELETE | `/{service}` | Deregister |

### Ingestion API (`/debug/api/ingest/`)

Language-agnostic data intake (OpenAPI 3.1 spec):

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/` | Single entry with collectors + context |
| POST | `/batch` | Multiple entries |
| POST | `/log` | Shorthand log entry |
| GET | `/openapi.json` | OpenAPI 3.1 specification |

The ingestion API allows Python, Node.js, or any language to send debug data to ADP.

### SSE (Server-Sent Events)

```
GET /debug/api/event-stream
→ data: {"type": "debug-updated", "payload": []}
```

Polls storage every 1 second for hash changes and pushes updates to connected clients.

## MCP Server

The MCP (Model Context Protocol) server exposes debug data to AI assistants like Claude.

### Transports

**stdio** (standalone):
```bash
php vendor/bin/adp-mcp --storage=/path/to/debug-data
```

**HTTP** (integrated):
```
POST /inspect/api/mcp
```

### Client Configuration

Claude Desktop (stdio):
```json
{
    "mcpServers": {
        "adp": {
            "command": "php",
            "args": ["vendor/bin/adp-mcp", "--storage=/path"]
        }
    }
}
```

Claude Desktop (HTTP via mcp-remote):
```json
{
    "mcpServers": {
        "AppDevPanel": {
            "command": "npx",
            "args": ["-y", "mcp-remote", "http://localhost:8080/inspect/api/mcp"]
        }
    }
}
```

Direct HTTP URL (for clients supporting HTTP transport):
```json
{
    "mcpServers": {
        "AppDevPanel": {
            "url": "http://localhost:8080/inspect/api/mcp"
        }
    }
}
```

### MCP API (`/inspect/api/mcp/`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/` | JSON-RPC 2.0 handler |
| GET | `/settings` | Get MCP enabled status |
| PUT | `/settings` | Toggle MCP on/off |

### Available Tools

All tools use JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol:

| Tool | Parameters | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `list_debug_entries` | `limit?`, `filter?` | Recent entries with summaries |
| `view_debug_entry` | `id`, `collector?` | Full entry data (10k char truncation per collector) |
| `search_logs` | `query`, `level?`, `limit?` | Full-text log search across entries |
| `analyze_exception` | `id?` | Exception chain, stack trace, context, recent logs |
| `view_database_queries` | `id?`, `slow_only?` | SQL queries with N+1 detection (100ms threshold) |
| `view_timeline` | `id?` | Performance waterfall (first 100 events) |

Response format:
```json
{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "id": 1,
    "result": {
        "content": [{"type": "text", "text": "..."}],
        "isError": false
    }
}
```

## CLI Commands

| Command | Options | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| `dev` | `--address`, `--port` | Start UDP debug server |
| `dev:broadcast` | `--message` | Send test messages |
| `debug:reset` | — | Clear all debug data |
| `debug:query` | `list`, `view <id>`, `--collector`, `--json` | Query stored debug data |
| `debug:serve` | `--host`, `--port`, `--storage-path`, `--frontend-path` | Start HTTP server |
| `mcp:serve` | `--storage` | Start MCP stdio server |

## Framework Adapters

### Common Integration Pattern

All adapters follow the same pattern:

1. **DI Registration** — Register Debugger, collectors, proxies in the framework's DI container
2. **Event Wiring** — Map framework lifecycle events to `Debugger::startup()` / `shutdown()`
3. **PSR Proxy Decoration** — Wrap Logger, EventDispatcher, HttpClient with proxies
4. **Config** — Provide sensible defaults with override options
5. **Inspector Setup** — Register `SchemaProviderInterface` for database inspector

### Symfony Adapter

**Registration**: `AppDevPanelBundle` + `AppDevPanelExtension` + `DebuggerCompilerPass`

**Proxy Decoration**: Uses Symfony's `setDecoratedService()` in CompilerPass.

**Event Subscribers**: `HttpSubscriber` and `ConsoleSubscriber` map Symfony kernel events to debugger lifecycle.

**Framework-Specific Collectors**:
- Doctrine DBAL middleware for database queries
- Twig profiler extension for template timing
- Security voter tracking
- Symfony Messenger integration
- Cache event listeners

**Configuration** (`config/packages/app_dev_panel.yaml`):
```yaml
app_dev_panel:
    enabled: true
    collectors:
        log: true
        event: true
        database: true
        # ...
```

### Laravel Adapter

**Registration**: `AppDevPanelServiceProvider` auto-registered via `extra.laravel.providers` in composer.json.

**Lifecycle**: Register services in `register()`, wire events in `boot()`.

**Data Capture**: Listens to Laravel events:
- `QueryExecuted` → DatabaseCollector
- `CacheHit/CacheMissed/KeyWritten/KeyForgotten` → CacheCollector
- `MessageSent` → MailerCollector
- `JobProcessed/JobFailed` → QueueCollector
- `ResponsePrepared` → HttpClientCollector

**Middleware**: `DebugMiddleware` wraps HTTP request/response cycle.

### Yii 3 (Yiisoft) Adapter

**Registration**: Config plugin auto-loads `config/di.php`.

**Proxy Setup**:
- `LoggerInterfaceProxy` decorates `Psr\Log\LoggerInterface`
- `EventDispatcherInterfaceProxy` decorates `Psr\EventDispatcher\EventDispatcherInterface`
- `HttpClientInterfaceProxy` decorates `Psr\Http\Client\ClientInterface`
- `ContainerInterfaceProxy` wraps the DI container via `DebugServiceProvider`

**Event Wiring**:
- `ApplicationStartup` → `Debugger::startup()`
- `BeforeRequest` → RequestCollector, WebAppInfoCollector
- `AfterRequest` → RequestCollector (response), `Debugger::shutdown()`

This is the reference adapter — most complete feature coverage.

### Yii 2 Adapter

**Registration**: Auto-bootstrap via `extra.bootstrap` in composer.json. Auto-registers as `modules['debug-panel']`.

**Data Capture**:
- `DbProfilingTarget` — Yii log target feeds DatabaseCollector
- `DebugLogTarget` — Real-time log capture
- Framework event listeners for mailer and assets

**Activation**: Only active when `YII_DEBUG` is true.

### Cycle ORM Adapter

Database schema provider only — no lifecycle integration. Provides `SchemaProviderInterface` implementation for the database inspector page.

## Frontend

### Tech Stack

- React 18.3+ / TypeScript 5.5+ / Vite 5.4+
- Material-UI (MUI) 5 with DataGrid and TreeView
- Redux Toolkit 1.9+ with RTK Query
- React Router 6
- React Hook Form + Yup
- Workbox 7 (PWA / Service Worker)
- Lerna 8 (monorepo)

### Monorepo Structure

```
libs/frontend/packages/
├── panel/       # Main SPA (debug viewer, inspector, LLM chat, MCP, OpenAPI)
├── toolbar/     # Lightweight embeddable widget
└── sdk/         # Shared SDK (components, API clients, helpers)
```

### Module System

Each frontend module implements `ModuleInterface`:

```typescript
interface ModuleInterface {
    routes: RouteObject[];
    reducers: Record<string, Reducer>;
    middlewares: Middleware[];
    standaloneModule: boolean;
}
```

**Current Modules:**
- **Debug** — Debug entry viewer (logs, database, events, timeline, exceptions, etc.)
- **Inspector** — Live app introspection (20+ pages: routes, database, Git, cache, files, etc.)
- **LLM** — AI chat and analysis (MCP integration)
- **Mcp** — MCP server setup and configuration
- **OpenAPI** — Swagger UI integration for the ingestion API
- **Frames** — iFrame support for remote panels

### Layout

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ TopBar (entry pill, search, theme toggle)     │
├──────────────┬───────────────────────────────┤
│ Sidebar      │ Content Area                   │
│  Home        │  <Outlet />                    │
│  Debug       │                                │
│  Inspector   │  [Debug / Inspector / etc.]    │
│  LLM         │                                │
│  OpenAPI     │                                │
│  Frames      │                                │
└──────────────┴───────────────────────────────┘
```

### Key Frontend Components

- `UnifiedSidebar` — Collapsible sections with dynamic debug collector items
- `EntrySelector` — Debug entry picker with filter configuration
- `CommandPalette` — Ctrl+K navigation (syncs with sidebar)
- `TopBar` — Entry pill, theme toggle, more menu
- `SearchFilter` — Reusable search with QWERTY/ЙЦУКЕН transliteration support

### Redux State Shape

```
application     # baseUrl, themeMode, toolbar, favorites
notifications   # toast alerts
store.debug     # current entry, collector
store.openApi   # API spec entries
store.frames2   # iFrame entries
api.debug       # RTK Query cache (debug endpoints)
api.inspector   # RTK Query cache (inspector endpoints)
api.llm         # RTK Query cache (LLM endpoints)
```

### Theming

Three-layer token system:
1. Primitives — Raw hex values, fonts, radii
2. Semantic — Light-mode palette
3. Dark semantic — Dark-mode overrides
4. Component tokens — MUI `styleOverrides`

Dark mode: `background.default: '#0F172A'`, `background.paper: '#1E293B'`, `text.primary: '#F1F5F9'`

## Tech Stack

- **PHP 8.4+**, PSR standards (PSR-3, PSR-7, PSR-11, PSR-14, PSR-15, PSR-16, PSR-17, PSR-18)
- **React 18**, TypeScript 5.5, Vite, Material-UI 5, Redux Toolkit
- **Build**: Composer (PHP), npm workspaces + Lerna (JS), Docker
- **Testing**: PHPUnit 11 (backend), Vitest (frontend)
- **Code Quality**: Mago (linter + formatter + static analyzer, written in Rust)

## Repository Structure

```
/
├── playground/                    # Demo/reference applications
│   ├── yiisoft-app/              # Yii 3 reference app
│   ├── symfony-basic-app/        # Symfony 7 demo
│   ├── laravel-app/              # Laravel 12 demo
│   └── yii2-basic-app/          # Yii 2 demo
├── libs/
│   ├── Kernel/                   # Core: debugger, collectors, storage, proxies
│   ├── API/                      # HTTP API: debug + inspector + SSE + MCP
│   ├── McpServer/                # MCP server: stdio + HTTP
│   ├── Cli/                      # CLI commands
│   ├── Testing/                  # Test fixtures
│   ├── Adapter/
│   │   ├── Yiisoft/              # Yii 3 adapter
│   │   ├── Symfony/              # Symfony adapter
│   │   ├── Laravel/              # Laravel adapter
│   │   ├── Yii2/                 # Yii 2 adapter
│   │   └── Cycle/                # Cycle ORM adapter (database only)
│   └── frontend/                 # Frontend monorepo
│       └── packages/
│           ├── panel/            # Main SPA
│           ├── toolbar/          # Embeddable toolbar widget
│           └── sdk/              # Shared SDK
└── docs/                         # Design and architecture docs
```

## Development

### Install

```bash
make install                  # Install ALL deps (PHP + frontend + playgrounds)
make install-php              # Composer install (root only)
make install-frontend         # npm install (libs/frontend)
make install-playgrounds      # Composer install for each playground
```

### Test

```bash
make test                     # All tests in parallel (PHP + frontend)
make test-php                 # PHP unit tests (PHPUnit, 755 tests)
make test-frontend            # Frontend unit tests (Vitest, 328 tests)
make test-frontend-e2e        # Frontend browser tests (Playwright)
make test-fixtures            # E2E scenarios against running playgrounds
```

### Code Quality

```bash
make check                    # All checks (Mago + ESLint + Prettier)
make fix                      # Auto-fix all code
make mago                     # PHP: format + lint + analyze
make mago-fix                 # PHP: auto-fix then check
make frontend-check           # Frontend: Prettier + ESLint
make frontend-fix             # Frontend: auto-fix
```

### Run Everything

```bash
make all                      # All checks + all tests
make ci                       # Full CI pipeline
```

BSD-3-Clause
